description_long: This kiosk is a compact, two-story structure with a modern, minimalist design. The lower level features an open front with two supporting columns and a staircase leading to the upper level, which is partially enclosed with a small service window or counter. The roof is flat with a slight overhang, providing shade and shelter to the upper level. The exterior surfaces are finished in neutral tones, with a combination of smooth concrete-like panels and a lighter trim around the upper floor. The kiosk sits on a square, tiled platform that extends beyond the building footprint, suggesting a designated area for customer interaction or queuing. There are no visible signs, windows, or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story kiosk with an open lower level, a partially enclosed upper level, and a flat overhanging roof, finished in neutral tones on a tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the open lower level with two columns, a staircase, and a small service window on the upper level.
description_view_1: Rear view reveals solid back walls on both levels with no openings or features.
description_view_2: Side view displays the solid side walls and the overhanging roof, with the staircase partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the same solid wall structure and the flat roof, with no visible openings.
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhang, appears to be concrete or similar material, no decorative elements
